title: MASALA TETRIS
description: First released in 2024, MASALA TETRIS is a unique twist on the indian Tetris game.

title: omeme_tetris
description: A modified version of the original MASALA TETRIS. Created for my DJ friend omeme.

title: MASALA TETRIS DX
description: The sequel to MASALA TETRIS. Featuring a polished UI and now with sound.

title: reverse reCaptcha
description: Can you pass as a human? 🤖 In Reverse reCaptcha, perfection is a failure.

title: MASALA TETRIS VINDALOO
description: The boldest sequel yet. Build spice combos to complete curries, in a roguelite with AI versus battles.

title: ASCII Roguelike
description: An ASCII-art roguelike. Delve into the dungeon in search of Bitcoin Yen.
